label: Pre pro B cell
evidence: The label 'Pre pro B cell' is used by the authors in the cell type annotations of the prenatal skin atlas (Gopee et al., 2024, doi:10.1038/s41586-024-08002-x). This corresponds to the earliest stage of B cell development, detected in fetal skin by scRNA-seq. Pre-pro-B cells are the most primitive B-lineage committed precursors, expressing CD34, SPINK2, and IGLL1 as described in the related fetal liver haematopoiesis study (Popescu et al., 2019).
